---
title: "predict"
generated: true
description: "Per-element prediction on a (new) design `X`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:predict -->
```python
predict(result: GLMResult, X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, type: PredictType = 'response') -> Float[Array, 'V N']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:predict -->
Per-element prediction on a (new) design `X`.

`type='link'` returns the linear predictor `eta = X beta`;
`type='response'` (default) applies the inverse link.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:predict -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `GLMResult` | — | — | — |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | — |
| `type` | `PredictType` | — | `'response'` | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `V` × `N`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:predict -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
